title: Topological Quantum Information Theory
description: Explore topological phases of matter and their application to fault-tolerant quantum computation. Learn about anyons, topological quantum error correction, and the connection between braiding and quantum gates.
learningObjectives: Explain topological phases of matter and their protected ground states
Describe anyons and their braiding statistics beyond bosons and fermions
Understand how topological quantum error correction provides protection
Analyze the toric code and surface codes as examples
Connect braiding operations to fault-tolerant quantum gates
Explore Fibonacci anyons and universal topological quantum computation
